MCP · for Claude Code
Remembug.

Give Claude Code
a memory.

Capture the fix the moment you solve a bug — then let Claude search it back via MCP. Stop re-debugging the same errors.

$npm i -g @devzen/remembug-cli
local SQLite no servers private by default Apache-2.0
remembug search
$ remembug search
  "vitest port already in use"
[0.84] Fix EADDRINUSE on
       parallel vitest workers
      tags: vitest, ports, eaddrinuse
      ✓ solved this before — reused
